name: American-Style Strata
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups Mozzarella or Monterey Jack, shredded
1 1/2 cups Cooked beef, lamb or pork, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10x6x2 baking dish, layer bread slices to cover the bottom of the dish.
2. Sprinkle cheese, meat and veggies over the bread.
3. In a bowl, stir together the eggs, milk and seasonings until well mixed.
4. Carefully pour the egg mixture over the ingredients in the baking dish.
5. Cover. Let stand 1 hour at room temperature or refrigerate for longer periods.
6. Uncover. Bake at 325°F for 50 to 60 minutes or until the center is nearly set.
7. Let stand 10 minutes. Cut into squares.
